headline: Roadmap bits (the “nice to have” pile)
subhead: A few of the bigger upgrades that fit your spec. These are landing-page bullets, not promises.

items.title: Page title cleanup
items.body: Strip “ChatGPT - ” from the tab title when running in the extension context.

items.title: Popover UX
items.body: Popovers close on outside click and on actions inside them.

items.title: Grab handle animation
items.body: Cute micro-handle that expands on hover and animates smoothly.

items.title: Prompt recall in composer
items.body: Up-arrow previews recent prompts; Right-arrow inserts full prompt.

items.title: Scroll + wide mode safeguards
items.body: Stop auto-scroll to bottom optionally; fix wide-mode overflow on long prompts.

items.title: Message collapsing
items.body: Collapse long chats with preview + char count; auto-collapse on send over X chars.

items.title: Your code blocks
items.body: Detect ``` in your messages, render styled blocks, syntax highlight, click-to-copy.

items.title: Font scaling
items.body: Scale Sidecar UI without changing browser zoom.
